name: STT Benchmark Gold-92
short_description: Held-out benchmark of 93 production voice clips for STT evaluation in the Rezolve voice commerce assistant, annotated with ground-truth transcripts and existing Deepgram and Whisper hypotheses.
size_description: 93 WAV clips (~58 MB total audio). Speakers include accented English (French, German, Hebrew, Korean, Russian, Spanish native languages) plus English-native Rezolve IR session recordings.

files.description: Full annotation set: clip_id, source, filename, ground-truth transcript, Deepgram Nova-2 production transcript, Whisper Large v2 transcript (93 records).
Simplified ground-truth index: clip_id and manually verified transcript only (93 records). Canonical reference for WER and entity accuracy computation.
DVC pointer to the 93 WAV audio files stored in Azure Blob Storage at azure://ml-dvc-datasets/datasets/rail-arf-stt. Run 'dvc pull' to download.
